info.description: This is the API documentation for the Grocerics backend service.
info.title: Grocerics API

delete.description: Delete the authenticated client's account. STUB — deletion not yet wired.

post.description: Issue a single-use reset token. Always 200, to avoid email enumeration.
Web-UI login with email + password. Clients use the phone/OTP routes.
Register a client by phone (sends OTP). MOCK — the code is printed to the server logs AND returned as data.otp_code (dev only). Verify via /auth/verify-phone-otp, which creates the account.
Send a login OTP to the phone. MOCK — no SMS; the code is printed to the server logs AND returned as data.otp_code (dev only).

Verify the OTP and issue client tokens. Creates the client account on first successful login (find-or-create by phone). `data.is_new` is true when this call created the account, so the app can route first-time users to onboarding.

get.description: Paginated list of all banners (admin sees inactive/expired too).

patch.description: Sets display_order from the given order (drag-to-reorder). Send the ids in the desired order.

get.description: The cart plus, for every enabled platform, the available/not-available split and totals.

post.description: Add a variant (upserts quantity if already present). Returns the updated cart.
post.summary: Add an item to the cart

get.description: Paginated list of categories (admin sees all, including disabled).

patch.description: Sets display_order from the given order (drag-to-reorder). Send every id in the desired order.

get.description: Paginated grid of product cards for a category in the user's city.
Cities the app serves — used by the location picker.
Paginated list of serviceable cities, including disabled.

Live QuickCommerce balance, for the admin navbar. Asking is free — it costs no credit itself. Every search costs 1 credit per platform; linking costs 0 when the candidate is relayed, and the fan-out to other enabled cities costs 1 per item per city.
Fetches the data needed to populate the admin dashboard, including headline stats, daily active users, and monthly active users.
Per-product prices across every active platform for the default (first enabled) city.
STUB — out of scope for the admin dashboard slice; overlaps /v1/home.
Fetches the headline stat cards for the admin dashboard: total users, average basket size, and total searches.

parameters.description: Accepted but currently inert — the response always carries a month-over-month diff
parameters.name: interval

get.description: Products ranked by how often they were the top search result.
Variants with a discounted platform price (mrp > price) in the user's city, as variant cards. Optional ?platforms= filters which reference prices are shown.

parameters.description: comma-separated platform codes; omitted = all enabled
parameters.name: platforms

get.description: Banners, top stores (platforms), trending categories and trending items for the user's city.

post.description: Batch form of confirm-link: one search response yields every (variant, platform) mapping the admin picked, sent in one call. Send price_paise + available per entry (from the response you're showing) and it costs 0 credits. Entries are independent — a bad entry is reported in `failed` and the rest still map, since every write is an idempotent upsert; re-send just the failures. Afterwards the backend fetches these same item ids in every OTHER enabled city in the background, so each city gets its own real price (1 credit per item per city).
post.summary: Map many variants to platforms from one search response

get.description: Discovery step: groupsearch across platforms so the admin can confirm the right item per platform. Costs 1 credit per platform. Never called on a consumer request.

parameters.description: city ID (supplies the QC location anchor)
parameters.name: city

parameters.description: comma-separated platform codes to search, e.g. blinkit,zepto. Omit to search every enabled QC-mapped platform. Costs 1 credit per platform.
parameters.name: platforms

post.description: Re-pulls live price+stock via GetItem for a variant or a whole product's variants in one city. Costs 1 credit per linked platform. One platform failing never fails the refresh.

patch.description: Sets display_order from the given order (drag-to-reorder). Send product ids in the desired order.

post.description: Creates a pack-size variant. Per-platform linking + price is set separately via the linking endpoints.
Admin fallback: pin the link and write the price by hand. price = MRP, discounted_price = shown price.
post.summary: Set a manual price (fallback when not on QuickCommerce)

patch.description: Sets display_order from the given order (drag-to-reorder). Send variant ids in the desired order.

post.description: Pins a (variant, platform) to the chosen QC item id and seeds its price/stock. Send price_paise + available from the search response you're already showing and this costs 0 credits; omit them and the server re-fetches via GetItem for 1 credit. The link is city-independent; the price is stored per city and is a reference only — mobile re-fetches live prices for the user's own pincode at cart time.
post.summary: Confirm a platform link for a variant

get.description: Joins links + platform_prices for a variant in a city — powers the wizard's Variations grid.

post.description: Saves an address; the pincode resolves to a serving city. Setting is_default updates the user's current city.

First-time setup for a client: sets the name, saves the default delivery address, and pins the current city — all in one transaction. City is derived from the device-geocoded `address.city` and must be one we serve (else 400). Location is required; the user never picks a city.

get.description: Enabled delivery platforms — powers the linking picker's platform checkboxes. Only those with searchable=true can be queried on QuickCommerce.

post.description: qc_name is the platform's name on QuickCommerce (e.g. "BlinkIt", "Zepto", "Swiggy"). Leave it blank and the platform exists but cannot be searched or linked.

patch.description: Set qc_name to make a platform searchable on QuickCommerce; clear it (send "-") to make it unsearchable.

get.description: Every platform including disabled ones. searchable=true means the platform has a QuickCommerce mapping (qc_name) and can be searched/linked.

patch.description: Sets display_order from the given order (drag-to-reorder). Send the ids in the desired order.

post.description: Generate a presigned PUT URL so client can upload directly to S3
post.summary: Get presigned URL for S3 upload

get.description: Variants with per-platform prices, average price, unit price, and similar products.

Variant-level search: matches products by name/brand, flattens to one row per variant, attaches stored REFERENCE prices for the user's city filtered to the selected platforms. Zero QuickCommerce calls. City defaults to the user's current city; pass ?city_id= to override.

parameters.description: comma-separated platform codes; omitted = all enabled
parameters.name: platforms

parameters.description: override city (defaults to the user's current city)
parameters.name: city_id

get.description: Fetches the About Us information.
Fetches the Terms and Conditions information.

patch.description: Sets display_order from the given order (drag-to-reorder). Send the ids in the desired order.

get.description: Paginated list of mobile clients (name, phone, status).

parameters.description: filter by status: active | disabled | banned
parameters.name: status

parameters.description: search by name or phone (max 128 chars)
parameters.name: search

post.description: Sets the client's status to "banned". Irreversible.

get.description: Same per-platform available/not-available shape as the cart.

post.summary: Add a variant to the wishlist

delete.summary: Remove a variant from the wishlist

serviceable.description: true if the pincode resolved to a serving city

dto.BannerItem.description: A promotional banner shown on the storefront.

end_date.description: Date the banner stops being visible, RFC3339

is_active.description:
Manual on/off switch. Can only turn a banner OFF — it never forces one
live outside its date window.

is_live.description:
Derived, read-only: whether the banner is actually showing right now
(is_active AND inside the date window). This is what the grid should display.

start_date.description: Date the banner becomes visible, RFC3339

title.description: Admin-facing name, so banners are distinguishable in the grid

dto.BannerMobileItem.description: A promotional banner shown on the mobile dashboard.

deeplink.description: App deeplink to navigate to when the banner is tapped

dto.BrandItem.description: A product brand as shown in brand listings.

display_order.description: Curated sort order (lower shows first in the app)

image_url.description: URL of the brand's display image

is_top_brand.description: Whether the brand is flagged as a top/featured brand

product_count.description: Number of products under this brand

display_order.description: Curated sort order (lower shows first in the app)

image_url.description: URL of the category's display image

is_top_category.description: Whether the category is flagged as a top/featured category

sub_category_count.description: Number of subcategories nested under this category

dto.CategoryData.description: Data Transfer Object for a Category entity.

dto.CityItem.description: A serviceable city. The lat/lng + default_pincode are the location

default_pincode.description: Pincode used as the default QuickCommerce location anchor

lat.description: Latitude of the city's QuickCommerce location anchor

lng.description: Longitude of the city's QuickCommerce location anchor

access_token.description: JWT access token used to authenticate subsequent requests

refresh_token.description: Token used to obtain a new access token once the current one expires

user_data.description: User data associated with the authenticated user

dto.DailyActiveUsers.description: Daily active user counts for the current week, keyed by day.

dto.DashboardMobile.description: Envelope for the mobile app's home dashboard endpoint.

banners.description: Promotional banners for the mobile dashboard

top_stores.description: Featured stores for the mobile dashboard

trending_categories.description: Trending product categories for the mobile dashboard

trending_items.description: Trending products for the mobile dashboard

dto.DashboardResponse.description: Envelope for the admin dashboard endpoint.

daily_active_users.description: Active user counts for the current week

monthly_active_users.description: Active user counts for the current year

dto.DashboardStats.description: Headline stat cards shown on the admin dashboard.

average_basket_size.description: Average number of items per basket

dto.InventoryManagementsItem.description: A single product row in the inventory management list.

image_url.description: URL of the product's display image

product_category.description: Name of the category the product belongs to

product_sub_category.description: Name of the sub-category the product belongs to ("" if none)

stock_count.description: Units currently in stock across all variants

subcategory_id.description: Unique identifier of the sub-category ("" if none)

top_item.description: Whether the product is flagged as a top/featured item

total_variants.description: Number of variants this product has

dto.InventoryManagementsStats.description: Headline stat cards shown on the inventory management dashboard.

platforms.description: Total number of tracked delivery platforms

dto.LivePrice.description: Paginated list of live product prices.

dto.MobileLoginRequest.description: Request payload submitted to the mobile app's phone-based login endpoint.

phone_number.description: Phone number to send the login OTP to, in E.164 format

dto.MonthlyActiveUsers.description: Monthly active user counts for the current year, keyed by month.

dto.PlatformItem.description: A delivery platform (Blinkit, Zepto, ...). qc_name maps it onto

code.description: Short code used in requests, e.g. "blinkit"

delivery_eta_text.description: Fallback delivery ETA copy, e.g. "10 Mins"

qc_name.description: The platform's name on QuickCommerce, e.g. "BlinkIt". Empty = not mapped.

searchable.description: True when qc_name is set, i.e. the platform can be searched/linked.

dto.PlatformPriceItem.description: One active platform's live price for a product. Money is integer paise (3800 = ₹38.00).

available.description: Whether the product is available on this platform

price_paise.description: Selling price in paise (0 if this platform has no price for the product)

dto.PresignedURL.description: Signed URL for uploading a file to the storage bucket.

expires_at.description: Expiration timestamp of the signed URL, RFC3339

key.description: Key of the file in the storage bucket

presigned_url.description: Signed URL for uploading the file

public_url.description: Public URL of the uploaded file

dto.ProductItem.description: A single product row as shown in product listings.

brand_id.description: Flat brand id, echoing the write shape

category_id.description: Flat category id, echoing the write shape (same value as product_category.product_category_id)

image_url.description: URL of the product's display image

is_top_item.description: Whether the product is flagged as a top/featured item

product_sub_category.description: Sub-category the product belongs to (zero-valued if none)

subcategory_id.description: Flat sub-category id, echoing the write shape

dto.ProductPrice.description: A product with its live price across every active platform.

platform_prices.description: One entry per active platform (dynamic — not a fixed set)

product_category.description: Name of the category the product belongs to

dto.ProductVariantItem.description: A single sellable variant of a product (e.g. a specific pack size).

product_volume.description: Volume or weight of this variant

dto.ProductVariantItems.description: List of sellable variants for a product.

dto.ProductVariantUnit.description: Volume/weight of a product variant, e.g. "500 gm".

value.description:
Numeric quantity of the unit. Float, not int: 2.25 ltr and 1.5 ltr are real
pack sizes, and domain.ProductVariant.VolumeValue is float64 over a numeric
column. Whole numbers still serialise as 2, not 2.0.

dto.Response.description: Generic response envelope wrapping every API response.

code.description: Machine-readable error/status code, present on failures

data.description: Response payload, shape depends on the endpoint

status.description: Outcome of the request, e.g. "success" or "failed"

dto.StatsItem.description: A single dashboard metric with its month-over-month change.

diff_last_month.description: Difference versus the previous month's value

dto.SubCategory.description: A subcategory nested under a product category.

category_name.description: Display name of the parent category

display_order.description: Curated sort order (lower shows first in the app)

image_url.description: URL of the subcategory's display image

is_top_sub_category.description: Whether the subcategory is flagged as a top/featured subcategory

access_token.description: JWT access token used to authenticate subsequent requests

refresh_token.description: Token used to obtain a new access token once the current one expires

user_data.description: User data associated with the authenticated user

dto.TopSearchProductItem.description: A product ranked by search volume.

product_category.description: Name of the category the product belongs to

search_count.description: Number of times the product was searched for

dto.TopStoreMobileItem.description: A featured store shown on the mobile dashboard.

eta.description: Estimated delivery time for the store, e.g. "10 mins"

image_url.description: URL of the store's display image

dto.TrendingCategoryMobileItem.description: A trending product category shown on the mobile dashboard.

image_url.description: URL of the category's display image

dto.TrendingItemMobileItem.description: A trending product shown on the mobile dashboard.

image_url.description: URL of the product's display image

lowest_price.description: Lowest price for the product across tracked delivery platforms

dto.UserData.description: User data associated with the authenticated user.

items.description: Page of users matching the current filters

mrp_paise.description: MRP in paise. 0 when the platform reports no MRP.

city.description: device-geocoded city; resolved to an enabled city server-side
